message:
================================================================================
  YOUTUBE DOWNLOADER PLUS
  Version 2.0 — Official Release Notes
================================================================================

  Developer       : Sujan Rai
  Previous Version: 1.0.8
  Current Version : 2.0
  Release Type    : Major Update

================================================================================
  TABLE OF CONTENTS
================================================================================

  1. Overview
  2. New Features
     2.1 More Tools Section
     2.2 Voice Recorder Tool
     2.3 Thumbnail Support in Search Results
     2.4 AI-Powered Translation
  3. Bug Fixes
  4. General Improvements
  5. Known File Paths and Shortcuts
  6. Closing Notes

================================================================================
  1. OVERVIEW
================================================================================

  YouTube Downloader Plus has been upgraded from version 1.0.8 to version 2.0.
  This is a major release that introduces significant new features, critical
  bug fixes, additional productivity tools, and overall improvements in
  application stability and user experience.

================================================================================
  2. NEW FEATURES
================================================================================

  2.1 MORE TOOLS SECTION
  ---------------------

  A dedicated "More Tools" button has been added to the main interface panel,
  providing centralized access to all supplementary tools included with the
  application.

  Key changes:

    - The previous "More Tools" menu has been deprecated and removed.
    - Access to supplementary tools is now available exclusively through
      the following methods:

        (a) The "More Tools" button located on the main application panel.
        (b) Navigation via Preferences Menu > More Tools.
        (c) Keyboard shortcut: CTRL+M

  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  2.2 VOICE RECORDER TOOL
  ------------------------

  A fully featured Voice Recorder tool has been introduced within the
  More Tools section. This tool is designed for productivity, ease of use,
  and advanced recording control.

  Capabilities:

    - Record audio notes with intuitive start, pause, resume, and stop
      controls.
    - Export and encode recordings directly to MP3 format at a higher
      bitrate.
    - Direct conversion pipeline eliminates the need for external
      encoding software.
    - Full screen reader compatibility, ensuring accessibility compliance
      for users who rely on assistive technologies.

  Output Directory:

    Documents > YouTube Downloader Plus > Recordings

  Future Development:

    The Voice Recorder tool is planned for continued enhancement and will
    receive additional features in subsequent releases.

  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  2.3 THUMBNAIL SUPPORT IN SEARCH RESULTS
  ----------------------------------------

  The search results panel now loads and displays video thumbnails
  alongside search results. When a video search is performed, thumbnail
  images for each returned result are automatically retrieved and rendered.

  Benefits:

    - Enhanced visual identification of search results.
    - Particularly useful for sighted users and users with low vision
      who benefit from visual context.

  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  2.4 AI-POWERED TRANSLATION
  ---------------------------

  Full transcripts and video descriptions can now be translated into any
  supported language using integrated AI translation capabilities.

  Workflow:

    1. Click the "Translate" button.
    2. Select the target language from the available options.
    3. Confirm the selection to initiate the translation process.
    4. Upon completion, the translated output can be copied to the
       clipboard or exported to a file.

================================================================================
  3. BUG FIXES
================================================================================

  The following categories of bugs identified in version 1.0.8 and earlier
  releases have been resolved in this update:

    - Playback Errors    : Resolved issues where certain videos returned in
                           search results failed to play and generated
                           runtime errors.

    - Download Failures  : Fixed bugs that caused interruptions, failures,
                           or unexpected behavior during the video download
                           process.

    - UI Freezing        : Addressed instances where the user interface
                           became unresponsive during various operations,
                           improving overall application responsiveness.

    - Additional Fixes   : Various minor bugs and edge-case issues reported
                           in prior versions have been identified and
                           resolved.

================================================================================
  4. GENERAL IMPROVEMENTS
================================================================================

    - Improved overall application stability across all modules.
    - Enhanced user interface responsiveness and interaction flow.
    - Optimized performance for search, playback, and download operations.
    - Strengthened accessibility support throughout the application.

================================================================================
  5. KNOWN FILE PATHS AND SHORTCUTS
================================================================================

  Recordings Output Path : Documents > YouTube Downloader Plus > Recordings
  More Tools Shortcut    : CTRL+M
  More Tools Navigation  : Preferences Menu > More Tools

================================================================================
  6. CLOSING NOTES
================================================================================

  This release represents a significant milestone for YouTube Downloader
  Plus, delivering expanded functionality, improved reliability, and a
  more refined user experience. Users are encouraged to update to version
  2.0 to benefit from all improvements and fixes outlined above.

  Thank you for using YouTube Downloader Plus.

================================================================================
  End of Release Notes — Version 2.0
  Copyright Sujan Rai. All rights reserved.
================================================================================
